# Baby Jungle Academy
> The nursery is the child's second home. We have more than 20 years of experience in nurseries. We deal with the child with all means of safety and modern education. We have distinguished teachers and skilled workers.

## Website
- Arabic (Primary): https://Baby-Jungle-Academy.github.io/
- English: https://Baby-Jungle-Academy.github.io/en
- Privacy Policy (AR): https://Baby-Jungle-Academy.github.io/privacy-policy
- Privacy Policy (EN): https://Baby-Jungle-Academy.github.io/privacy-policy-en

## About
Baby Jungle Academy is a nursery and early childhood education center based in Nasr City, Cairo, Egypt. The academy operates 7 days a week (Sunday to Saturday) from 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM.

## Commercial Registration
رقم السجل التجاري: 274274

## Locations
- Branch 1: 4 Hay El-Safarat, Sharia Sabeel El-Mou'meneen, Nasr City, Cairo Governorate
- Branch 2: 16 Sharia El-Gama'a, Zahraa Nasr City

## Activities
- Academic Study
- English Course
- Fitness
- Skills Development
- Montessori
- Speech Therapy
- Behavior Modification
- Quran, Hadith, and Prophetic Stories Memorization
- Zumba
- Drawing and Art Classes
- Crafts
- Handmade Activities
- Crochet
- Summer Camp
- Winter Camp

## Academy Rules
1. No hitting under any circumstances.
2. No insulting or verbally abusing the child.
3. No sick children, or children with a fever or rash, will be admitted.
4. Children of determination / special needs are welcome, provided they do not cause harm to others.
5. Hygiene and cleanliness of the child, facility, and staff are strictly mandatory.
6. No celebration of non-Muslim holidays.
7. A complete change of clothes must be brought with the child daily.
8. Parents are not permitted inside the academy except during enrollment, which is available at any time of day.
